About JPCInc.®

Built on Honesty, Integrity & Professionalism

For 21 years, JP Communications Inc. has conducted all business based on the principle of HIP — Honesty, Integrity and Professionalism. Our primary goal as a leading online B2B global trade platform is to provide superior service to all our customers, wholesale buyers, and suppliers.

Founded in 2005 by CEO Jason Prescott and former CTO Joseph Preston, JPCInc. launched as a network of B2B global trade platforms. The flagship site, the wholesale search engine TopTenWholesale.com, launched that same year.

JPCInc. takes pride in its ability to solve industry problems. Our innovations enable stakeholders to connect globally for mutually profitable trade transactions, use free community resources for gaining industry knowledge, and access cutting-edge sourcing tools.

We strive to serve our customers' best interests while maintaining an exceptional reputation among industry stakeholders. Our forward-thinking philosophy and passion for helping others "Find it. Source it. Profit!" on the internet have served us well.

Our Core Principles

H
Honesty
I
Integrity
P
Professionalism
Company Timeline
2005
JPCInc. Founded

Jason Prescott and Joseph Preston launch JP Communications Inc. and TopTenWholesale.com — the wholesale search engine for American buyers.

2009
Manufacturer.com Acquired

JPC purchases Manufacturer.com, headquartered in Hangzhou, China — expanding the company's reach to global factory-grade suppliers.

2013
McGraw-Hill Publishes Wholesale 101 & Retail 101

CEO Jason Prescott authors the first true B2B product sourcing books in the US wholesale industry — published by McGraw-Hill, one of the world's largest publishers. A milestone for the entire sourcing community.

2016
Apparel Textile Sourcing Launched

JPC became a producer of what is now one of North America's leading sourcing trade shows for the apparel and textile industry. Launched in Toronto, the shows expanded to Montréal, Miami, and Berlin, Germany.

Our Platforms

Three Properties. One Ecosystem.

Each platform serves a distinct segment of global B2B trade — together forming a complete sourcing and selling ecosystem for buyers and suppliers worldwide.

US Platform
2005
Founded

The USA's largest B2B wholesale supplier platform — connecting buyers and suppliers since 2005. Over 1,000,000 products from wholesalers, liquidators, and importers available to online and offline resellers.

Our Supplier Pass™ patented verification offers the highest level of supplier trust on the internet. Ideal for retailers, eCommerce businesses, Amazon & eBay sellers of all sizes.

#1
US Trade Platform

USA's first trade platform to offer sourcing professionals, entrepreneurs and traders trustworthy manufacturers from around the world. Over 300,000 suppliers from 190+ regions represented.

Buyers work directly with trade managers. Supplier Pass™ verification, premium showrooms, Pay Per Click advertising, and full logistics integration make global sourcing simple.

USA · Canada · Europe
Apparel Textile Sourcing
3+
Countries
4
Annual Shows
🌍
Global Reach

Launched in 2016 in Toronto, Apparel Textile Sourcing has grown into one of North America's leading sourcing trade shows for the apparel and textile industry. Shows have run in Toronto, Montréal, Miami, and Berlin, Germany — and the series continues to expand.

International manufacturers, wholesalers, fabric suppliers, and fashion brands meet with buyers, sourcing directors, designers, merchandisers, and retail chains.

USA · Canada Europe Apparel Textiles & Fashion
View Trade Shows →
Live Events

Apparel Textile Sourcing Shows

ATS connects international apparel, textile, fashion, and fabric manufacturers and wholesalers with buyers at four premier global events each year.

🇨🇦

Apparel Textile Sourcing Toronto, Canada

Where it all started in 2016. Toronto remains a premier destination for thousands of buyers from Canada, the USA, and the world — connecting apparel & fabric buyers, sourcing directors, designers, merchandisers, and retail chains.

View Show Site →
🏙️

Montréal Matchmaking Event

An exclusive one-day-only matchmaking event in Montréal. Meet the best key international suppliers and manufacturers in an intimate hotel setting that gets real business done. Both Spring/Summer and Fall/Winter collections represented.

View Show Site →
🇺🇸

Apparel Textile Sourcing Miami

Brings international apparel, textile, and fashion manufacturers to North America to meet with buyers, sourcing professionals, designers, importers, distributors, business owners, and students looking to build careers in the industry.

View Show Site →
🇩🇪

Apparel Textile Sourcing Berlin, Germany

JPCInc.'s European destination brought international apparel, textile, and fashion manufacturers together with buyers from Germany, the EU, and the world — including apparel buyers, sourcing directors, designers, merchandisers, and retail chains.

View Show Site →
Live Events · Fashion · Global Trade

Apparel Textile Sourcing — The Experience

From Toronto to Miami, Berlin to Montréal — 10 years of connecting the world's apparel industry. Watch the shows that defined North American textile sourcing.

Featured · Toronto 2019
Apparel Textile Sourcing Canada 2019
Official recap of one of Canada's premier sourcing events — connecting thousands of buyers, designers, and manufacturers from across North America and the world.
🏆 20K+ Views 📍 Toronto, Canada 📅 2019

Arsenal, Toronto · 10 Years 2016–2025

Our Services

Complete Supply-Chain Solutions

JPCInc.® offers a diverse range of services designed to solve real industry problems and connect buyers with the right suppliers efficiently.

🛡️

Supplier Pass™ Verification

Premium members are suppliers and service providers who have successfully passed a Company Profile Verification (CPV) by an accredited third-party agency. The most trusted supplier verification system in B2B trade.

🎯

Custom Sourcing

Our specialists match buyers' detailed sourcing requirements with the right suppliers — efficiently and at scale. Post a detailed RFQ and connect with pre-qualified Premium and Verified suppliers. Save time. Save costs. Find quality.

🚚

Logistics & Warehousing

Warehousing facilities strategically located in Los Angeles and New Jersey — the most active ports in America. We also offer packaging, assembly, shrink wrapping, and other value-added services for eCommerce and manufacturing clients.

📊

Advertising Solutions

A wide range of advertising products enabling suppliers to reach thousands of wholesale buyers monthly. Pay Per Click, banner advertising, hot buy buttons, and seller preview video ads available across both platforms.

🎬

Wholesale Video Hub

JPCInc.® launched the first dedicated video hub where the wholesale community can view and post business videos. Suppliers showcase their factories, products, and capabilities to buyers worldwide — free of charge.

🤝

Trade Show Solutions

Add trade shows to your company profile and connect with serious buyers attending events worldwide. Choose from hundreds of international and domestic trade shows — and let buyers know which ones you'll be attending.

Publications

Industry Knowledge, Distilled

Two essential guides for anyone building a wholesale or retail business — written by the people who built the industry's leading platforms.

📦
Published by McGraw-Hill · 2013

Wholesale 101

by Jason A. Prescott — First B2B sourcing book in the US wholesale industry

A breakthrough book offering newbies and veterans an inside guide to working with wholesalers, navigating trade shows, and sourcing strategies to foster long-lasting, profitable relationships. Quickly gain insider tribal knowledge on one of the hardest businesses to crack.

🏪

Retail 101

by Nicole Leinbach Reyhle & Jason A. Prescott

From the Founder of Retail Minded and the Independent Retailer Conference, and the CEO of TopTenWholesale.com and Manufacturer.com — a realistic, practical, and useful guide for brick-and-mortar and online merchants looking to compete successfully in today's retail world.

What Our Members Say

Trusted by Businesses Worldwide

"BrandsGateway.com currently receives about 80% of our USA buyer traffic from TopTenWholesale.com. The platform has been instrumental in connecting us with serious American retail buyers."

MT
Michael Tekin
BrandsGateway.com

"I've been a Premium Member on Manufacturer.com for 2 years. When I joined I immediately started to receive interest from buyers and have developed many into new customers. I get good inquiries from my online showroom."

JX
Jordan Xiong
Global Imports Inc.
Leadership

Meet the Founder

JP Communications Inc. was built by one of the most experienced figures in the global wholesale, manufacturing, and retail sourcing industry.

JP
Jason Aaron Prescott
Founder & CEO — JP Communications Inc. (JPCInc.®)

Jason Prescott founded JP Communications Inc. in 2005 with a vision to facilitate international trade at every level. He launched TopTenWholesale.com that same year, and in 2009 acquired Manufacturer.com from Hangzhou, China — expanding JPC's reach to global factory-grade suppliers. That year, Jason was also named Trade Ambassador by the Chinese government's Jiaozhou Investment Promotion Bureau.

He is the author of Wholesale 101 and co-author of Retail 101 with Nicole Leinbach Reyhle. He is also the founder of the Apparel Textile Sourcing trade shows — now the fastest-growing shows in the USA, Canada, and Europe — and founder of Alteca Home Builders, a residential construction company based in South Fork, Colorado.

B2B Trade Global Sourcing Trade Shows Published Author Real Estate

Meet the Founder

JP Communications Inc. was built by one of the most experienced figures in the global wholesale, manufacturing, and retail sourcing industry.

JP
Jason Aaron Prescott
Founder & CEO — JP Communications Inc. (JPCInc.®)

Jason Prescott founded JP Communications Inc. in 2005 with a vision to facilitate international trade at every level. He launched TopTenWholesale.com that same year, and in 2009 acquired Manufacturer.com from Hangzhou, China — expanding JPC's reach to global factory-grade suppliers. That year, Jason was also named Trade Ambassador by the Chinese government's Jiaozhou Investment Promotion Bureau.

He is the author of Wholesale 101 and co-author of Retail 101 with Nicole Leinbach Reyhle. He is also the founder of the Apparel Textile Sourcing trade shows — now the fastest-growing shows in the USA, Canada, and Europe — and founder of Alteca Home Builders, a residential construction company based in South Fork, Colorado.
